ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prenatal_care" (
  "prenatal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prenatal care record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record associated with the prenatal care */,
  "prenatal_visits" INTEGER /* Number of prenatal visits */,
  "prenatal_start" TEXT /* Date of the first prenatal visit */,
  "prenatal_end" TEXT /* Date of the last prenatal visit */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prenatal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prenatal_care_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record associated with the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "treatment_start" TEXT /* Date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, government dataset) */,
  "data_source_date" TEXT /* Date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record associated with the data version */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source associated with the data version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
